description_long: This sculpture depicts a slender, upright human figure with a rough, textured surface, suggesting it may be cast in bronze or a similar dark metal. The figure stands in a relaxed pose, with one arm raised and the other by its side, and the head slightly tilted. The surface is uneven, with visible ridges and indentations, giving it an expressive, almost abstract quality. The coloration is predominantly dark, with lighter highlights accentuating the contours and details of the form. The base is small and rectangular, just large enough to support the figure. The overall impression is one of a modern or contemporary art piece, likely intended for public display.
description: A slender, upright human figure sculpture with a rough, dark metallic surface and expressive, abstract features. The figure stands on a small rectangular base with one arm raised.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal outline of the figure, with the raised arm and detailed torso most visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the raised arm, and the curvature of the back.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the figure, with the arm and leg contours visible but less detail on the face.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the side profile, the arm's position, and the textured surface along the torso.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate installation environment.
